free_text: One-neutron transfer reaction and refractive effects
in the 16O+ 16O system
250 to 480 MeV
704 and 1120 MeV
For the oxygen targets different compounds have been
used: 6Li2O, CaO and V2O5. The latter two were
prepared as self-supporting foils in the range of
0.2-1.4 mg/cm2 thickness and the former on a
carbon-backing of 60 ug/cm2 thickness.
Q3D magnetic spectrograph at Hahn-Meitner Inst.;
SPEG spectrograph at GANIL
The error bars are mainly of statistical
nature.
At very forward angles and in deep minima, where in
some cases background from target contamination has
been subtracted, they have been increased in order
to take the uncertainty in the subtraction procedure
into account.
This is independent, whether the errors are given in
absolute values or as percent-errors.
The procedure of calibration and precision the angular
scale, which is very important (especially for Mott
ratio)
Data received from Prof.H.G.Bohlen
